description: Use this API to change the value of a CON of the VSC dc line model of a specified VSC dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_vsdclmod_con(dcname, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: dcname
parameters.description: Vsc dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
model at this dc line is aaa not xxx.
CON number outside of the CON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
